category_sources: Official Umple manual at https://manual.umple.org/ says Umple is a technology for Model-Oriented Programming and supports textual UML modeling and code generation.
source_facts.description says modeling tool/programming language for Model-Oriented Programming.
display_name_sources: Official manual and website use "Umple" at https://manual.umple.org/ and https://www.umple.org.
docs_sources: Dedicated official user manual is at https://manual.umple.org/.
Official combined manual page is at https://cruise.umple.org/umple/UmpleUserManualCombined.html.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is non-empty; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official manual says Umple creates UML models textually, embeds UML constructs in programs, and generates code.
source_facts.description identifies a modeling tool/programming language and Model-Oriented Programming.
